content: My husband came home at 8:00 PM on November 14. He watched TV until 11:30 PM, then went to sleep. I woke up once at 2:45 AM because I heard the AC turn on—he was asleep beside me. I checked the CCTV from our apartment lobby. He never left the house. He doesn’t know how to hack. He’s not tech-savvy beyond his job. He’s always been honest. I don’t know who Vikram Singh is. I’ve never heard of cryptocurrency. I don’t understand why they’re accusing him.
